name: mat4person-evidence-atlas
description: Build and audit source-grounded relationship atlases from research documents.

interface.shortDescription: Create a verifiable evidence atlas from source documents.
interface.longDescription: Extract candidate relationships, validate exact evidence, audit provenance, and prepare a research atlas for publication.
defaultPrompt: Build a verified evidence atlas from these sources.
Audit this graph and locate every quotation.
Compare Luna extraction with my gold labels.
